resources.string: H蓹qiq蓹t蓹n bu mahn谋n谋 gizl蓹tm蓹k ist蓹yirsiz? Onun dinl蓹nm蓹 vaxt谋 v蓹 qal谋臒谋 silin蓹c蓹k. Bu t蓹l蓹b geri d枚nm蓹zdir.

Bu s蓹n蓹tkar hans谋sa ayr谋 se莽m蓹 buraxmad谋

Lirikalar谋 t蓹krar 蓹ld蓹 et
N蓹tic蓹 tap谋lmad谋. F蓹rqli sor臒u v蓹 ya kateqoriya yoxla

Mahn谋 枚rt眉y眉n g枚st蓹r
S蓹sl蓹ndiril蓹n mahn谋 枚rt眉y眉n kilid ekran谋 divar ka臒谋z谋 kimi istifad蓹 et
Qal谋q bo艧lu臒u bitdikd蓹, 蓹n uzun m眉dd蓹t 眉莽眉n giri艧 olunmayan ehtiyatlar silinir
艦蓹xsi se莽iml蓹r (y蓹ni tema rejimi) v蓹 qal谋q istisnad谋r.

M蓹lumat bazas谋n谋 xarici yadda艧dan idxal et

Axtar谋艧 tarix莽蓹sin蓹 fasil蓹 ver
Yeni axtar谋lan sor臒ular谋 saxlama, tarix莽蓹ni g枚st蓹rm蓹
Axtar谋艧 tarix莽蓹sin t蓹mizl蓹
Batareya optimalla艧mas谋 istifad蓹 edil蓹rs蓹, dinl蓹m蓹 bildiri艧i, dayand谋r谋ld谋qda ans谋z it蓹 bil蓹r.
Android 12-d蓹n b蓹ri \"Yenilm蓹z xidm蓹t\" se莽iminin t蓹sirli olmas谋 眉莽眉n batareya optimalla艧mas谋n qapatmaq t蓹l蓹b olunur.
Batareya optimalla艧mas谋na m蓹h蓹l qoyma
Batareya optimalla艧mas谋n qapatmaq kifay蓹t deyils蓹

Simli v蓹 ya bluetooth cihaz谋 qo艧ulduqda
S蓹sl蓹nm蓹 vaxt谋 s蓹ssiz hiss蓹l蓹ri 枚t眉r
S蓹s ucal谋臒谋n sabit s蓹viyy蓹y蓹 t蓹nziml蓹
Sistem tarazlay谋c谋 il蓹 qar艧谋l谋ql谋 蓹laq蓹
M枚vcud m蓹lumat 眉z蓹rin蓹 yaz谋lacaq. %1$s m蓹lumat bazas谋n谋 b蓹rpa etdikd蓹n sonra 枚z眉 avtomatik ba臒lanacaq.
A艧a臒谋dak谋 d眉ym蓹y蓹 klikl蓹y蓹n蓹 kimi diqq蓹t et, qal谋q qovluq yeri standarta s谋f谋rlanacaq
Android 10-dan bu x眉susiyy蓹t m枚vcud olmaya bil蓹r
T蓹tbiq tap艧谋r谋q idar蓹edicid蓹n s眉r眉艧d眉r眉ld眉kd蓹
Lirikalar 蓹ld蓹 edil蓹nd蓹 x蓹ta ba艧 verdi
bu mahn谋 眉莽眉n m枚vcud deyil
艦蓹b蓹k蓹 s蓹hvi ba艧 verdi
S蓹sl蓹ndiril蓹 bil蓹n s蓹s format谋 tapmaq al谋nmad谋
Bu mahn谋n谋n 蓹sil video m蓹nb蓹yi silindi
Bu mahn谋 server m蓹hdudiyy蓹tl蓹rin蓹 g枚r蓹 s蓹sl蓹ndiril蓹 bilm蓹z
Qaytar谋lan video id t蓹l蓹b olunan il蓹 uy臒unla艧m谋r
Nam蓹lum s蓹sl蓹nm蓹 x蓹tas谋 ba艧 verdi
Bu, mahn谋n谋 m眉mk眉n T枚vsiy蓹l蓹r v蓹 ya C蓹ld Se莽iml蓹r kimi daxil etm蓹k 眉莽眉n 蓹n az dinl蓹m蓹 vaxt谋d谋r

D蓹y蓹r bo艧 ola bilm蓹z

Geri d眉ym蓹si il蓹 t蓹tbiqi ba臒la
茝sas s蓹hif蓹d蓹n geri d眉ym蓹sin istifad蓹 ed蓹nd蓹

YouTube v蓹 ya YouTube Music-d蓹ki pleylist, albom, kanal v蓹 ya bir mahn谋n谋n tam linkin yerl蓹艧dir蓹 bil蓹rsiniz

K蓹艧f et-d蓹 dili aktivl蓹艧dir
M眉mk眉ns蓹, K蓹艧f m蓹zmunun do臒ma dilinizd蓹 q蓹bul etm蓹y蓹 icaz蓹 verir.
H蓹qiq蓹t蓹n bu pleylistd蓹ki m枚vqel蓹ri yenid蓹n n枚mr蓹l蓹m蓹k ist蓹yirsiniz?
M枚vqel蓹ri yenid蓹n n枚mr蓹l蓹
B眉t眉n s蓹sl蓹ndirm蓹 f蓹aliyy蓹tl蓹rin silm蓹k ist蓹yirsiniz?
Ed蓹 bil蓹c蓹yiniz f蓹aliyy蓹tl蓹r:
Github burax谋l谋艧lar谋 s蓹hif蓹sin a莽 v蓹 蓹n son versiyan谋 endir
Github-dan 蓹n son versiyan谋 y眉kl蓹yin, fayl谋 bildiri艧 sah蓹sind蓹 tapacaqs谋n谋z v蓹 眉z蓹rin蓹 klikl蓹m蓹kl蓹 qura艧d谋ra bil蓹rsiniz
F-Droid istifad蓹莽il蓹ri ad蓹t蓹n IzzyOnDroid depo il蓹 bir ne莽蓹 saat v蓹 F-Droid.org depo il蓹 bir ne莽蓹 g眉n olmaqla F-Droid-d蓹n yenil蓹m蓹ni g枚zl蓹y蓹 bil蓹rl蓹r.
Yenil蓹m蓹 yoxlan谋lmas谋n谋 aktivl蓹艧dir
Aktiv olanda, ba艧lan臒谋cda yeni versiya yoxlan谋l谋r v蓹 bildirilir.
Yenil蓹m蓹 m枚vcud olduqda, onu qura艧d谋rmaq ist蓹yib-ist蓹m蓹diyiniz soru艧ulacaq. Arxada avtomatik qura艧d谋rmalar olmayacaq.
H蓹l蓹 t蓹nziml蓹m蓹l蓹rd蓹n a莽a v蓹 ya ba臒laya bil蓹rsiniz.
Yuxu Taymeri D眉ym蓹sini G枚st蓹r
Lakin bu yenil蓹m蓹l蓹r, m蓹s蓹l蓹n, IzzyOnDroid v蓹 ya F-Droid-d蓹 t蓹tbiq edil蓹n 蓹lav蓹 yoxlamadan ke莽m蓹y蓹c蓹k.

Aktiv edil蓹rs蓹, m眉dd蓹ti h蓹ddi ke莽蓹n mahn谋lar 莽谋xar谋lacaq, 蓹n sevdiyim v蓹 dinl蓹m蓹 n枚vb蓹sin蓹 t蓹tbiq edil蓹c蓹k

Bu mahn谋n谋 h蓹qiq蓹t蓹n silm蓹k ist蓹yirsiniz? M蓹lumat bazas谋ndan silin蓹c蓹k. Bu proses geri d枚nm蓹zdir.
Ba艧qa dil蓹 t蓹rc眉m蓹 et
H蓹qiq蓹t蓹n bu mahn谋n谋 t蓹krar almaq ist蓹yirsiz? Dinl蓹m蓹 vaxt谋 v蓹 toplanm谋艧 m蓹lumatlar silin蓹c蓹k. Bu proses geri d枚nm蓹zdir.
C蓹ld se莽iml蓹rd蓹 statistika, tarix莽蓹 v蓹 t蓹klifl蓹r 眉莽眉n i艧l蓹dil蓹n dinl蓹m蓹 prosesl蓹rini saxlam谋r
陌lkin t蓹nziml蓹m蓹l蓹r蓹 qaytar
Yeni dinl蓹m蓹 siyah谋s谋 yarat
S蓹s ucal谋臒谋 t蓹m蓹l keyfiyy蓹ti
S蓹sin yax艧谋la艧d谋r谋lmas谋 眉莽眉n h蓹d蓹f m枚vqe
Bu median谋 s蓹sl蓹ndirm蓹k 眉莽眉n giri艧 t蓹l蓹b olunur

Kitabxanan谋zda olmayan mahn谋lar谋n silinm蓹si. Emal bitdikd蓹n sonra t蓹tbiq ba臒lanacaq

Bu mahn谋n谋 t蓹krar uyu艧dur

RiMusic B蓹y蓹nil蓹n Mahn谋lar谋, Youtube-da B蓹y蓹n
(t蓹xmini vaxt) b眉t眉n mahn谋lar谋 b蓹y蓹nm蓹k t蓹l蓹b olunur. Aral谋qda l蓹臒v edil蓹rs蓹, bu f蓹aliyy蓹t davam etdiril蓹 bilm蓹z. Bu prosesi l蓹臒v etm蓹k 眉莽眉n t蓹tbiqi ba臒lamal谋s谋n谋z. Davam etm蓹k ist蓹yirsiniz?

Show image loader while loading images
Import the database from other backup. Be careful, you may need to reinstall the app.
Play when a wired or bluetooth device is connected and pause if disconnected
Missing microphone permissions, please grant it in the app settings
Music barely brushes against you, a small taste of a much bigger world. You\'re just starting your journey.
You\'re starting to explore, discovering new sounds and crafting your first soundtracks. Curiosity is your guide.
Music is your daily companion. Every day has its playlist, and every song a destination.
You don\'t just listen to music; you live it. The notes guide your deepest emotions and memories.
You are a beacon in the world of music. Your listening is a ritual, a deep and constant connection with the art of sound.
You are not just a listener; you are an integral part of the sonic universe. Your name is whispered between the notes.
You\'ve had a look, a small taste of what this month has to offer.
You\'re discovering new tracks and artists, building the soundtrack for right now.
Music has become the backbone of your days. Every moment has its own song.
Your headphones are almost an extension of you. You\'re always tuned into the right frequency.
You don\'t just listen to music; you control it. You are the master of this month\'s atmosphere.
Your listening level is legendary. You\'re a sonic reference point for everyone around you.
The music you love is a piece of you. Sharing it is the best way to connect with others.
Keep listening, keep sharing, keep loving, never hate anyone.

Your listening!
Your discoveries!
Your obsessions!
Get ready to relive your most unforgettable musical moments.
Remember, your privacy is respected!\nAll data used is only in your device and managed by you.
To ensure that the app is working properly in the background (e.g. for notifications or music playback), you must enable autostart. Do you want to open the settings to activate it?
If empty, system api key will be used
Playlists, albums, artists, history, like, etc.
AudioTag recognizes music using its own proprietary patented acoustic fingerprinting technology.
Enter the name of log export
Restore backup or shared appearance settings
It seems like you haven\'t listened to any songs
This song was the soundtrack to your year. \n An obsession you couldn\'t stop listening to.
It\'s not just a song, it\'s your anthem. \n It defined your summer, your winter, your life.
This song isn\'t just an anthem, it\'s the soundtrack to your life. \n The rhythm that accompanies your days.
You and this song are one and the same. \n An eternal flame burning in your musical heart. \n A legend.
You love conducting a Deep Dive
You listen to it On Repeat
It seems like you haven\'t listened to any albums
You didn\'t stop at the singles. \n You dove deep into this masterpiece, note by note.
This album was on repeat for weeks. \n You know every word, every pause, every beat.
You didn\'t just listen to this album, you lived in it. \n You\'re not just a listener, you\'re a resident.
This album is more than music, it\'s your sanctuary. \n A sacred place to return to for peace and inspiration.
It seems like you haven\'t listened to any playlists
You\'re not just a listener, you\'re a curator. \n You created the perfect soundtrack for a moment.
Your playlist is a work of art. \n Maybe you should consider a career as a DJ.
This playlist isn\'t just a list of songs, it\'s a phenomenon. \n A cultural event in your world.
You didn\'t just create a playlist, you composed a masterpiece.\n This is your magnum opus, your legacy.
It seems like you haven\'t listened to any artists
You discovered a new favorite and can\'t stop listening. \n The beginning of a beautiful musical story.
This artist made it to your A-List. \n Their music is a constant and loved presence in your routine.
You don\'t just stick to the hit singles. \n You\'ve explored every corner of their discography, becoming a true expert.
This artist\'s music is more than just sound, it\'s a part of you. \n A deep and unbreakable bond.
